subcodes.first_line: Verily the Fire hath proclaimed from the Tree on Sinai: "God, and none other besides Him, is the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting!" And the Light from the horizon [3.5s]... ...Glory be unto Thee, O Lord my God! Thou art the Almighty and worthy of all praise, the Lord of majesty, the Everlasting. I testify that Thy grace hath enveloped me
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان النار تنطق فی السدره الله لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم و النور من افق
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @proclamation to the people of the world, @prayer for protection, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
